rules: if Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT on
if Living Room motion true then Living Room AC on 20 cool
if Living Room temperature > 28.2 then Living Room AC on 10 cool
if Living Room temperature > 28.2 AND Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT on
if Living Room temperature > 28.2 AND Living Room motion true then Living Room AC on 11 cool
if Living Room temperature > 28.2 AND Living Room motion false then Living Room LIGHT off
if Living Room temperature > 28.2 AND Living Room motion false then Living Room AC on 10 cool
if Living Room temperature < 21.7 AND Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT on
if Living Room temperature < 21.7 AND Living Room motion true then Living Room AC on 20 cool
if Living Room temperature < 21.7 AND Living Room motion false then Living Room LIGHT off
if Living Room temperature < 21.7 AND Living Room motion false then Living Room AC on 21 cool
if Living Room temperature > 28.2 OR Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT on
if Living Room temperature > 28.2 OR Living Room motion true then Living Room AC on 11 cool
if Living Room temperature < 21.7 OR Living Room motion true then Living Room LIGHT on
if Living Room temperature < 21.7 OR Living Room motion true then Living Room AC on 20 cool
